emergency.label: All Purpose
emergency.number: 112 (unified since 2023 — covers ambulance, police, fire, all emergencies)

entryRequirements.visaNote: Many nationalities can obtain Turkey's e-Visa online in advance; some nationalities are visa-free. Check by nationality before travel.
entryRequirements.officialSource: Republic of Türkiye Electronic Visa Application System (evisa.gov.tr)

transportInfo.paymentCard: Istanbulkart (covers metro, tram, bus, funicular, and ferries — cash not accepted on most transport)
transportInfo.note: Istanbulkart is essential — cash payment is not possible on almost any public transport, buy one at the airport immediately.

publicHolidays2026.name: Eid al-Fitr / Ramazan Bayrami (lunar, confirm dates)
Commemoration of Atatürk, Youth and Sports Day
Eid al-Adha / Kurban Bayrami (lunar, confirm dates)

majorEventsNote: Eid holidays (Ramazan and Kurban Bayrami) are the two biggest domestic travel surges — Istanbul empties of some locals but hotel/flight prices still spike due to international demand. Confirm exact 2026 lunar dates closer to travel.
